Class GameParameters

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
public abstract class GameParameters extends Object
Defines the constant configuration parameters for the poker game. This class contains various global constants such as blind values, starting chips, port number, and limits on player count.

This class is abstract and cannot be instantiated.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    AVATAR_COUNT
    The number of avatars available for players.
    static final int
    BIG_BLIND
    The amount of chips for the big blind.
    static final int
    CARD_COUNT
    The number of cards in a standard deck.
    static final int
    MAX_PLAYERS
    The maximum number of players allowed in a game.
    static final int
    MIN_PLAYERS
    The minimum number of players required to start a game.
    static final int
    PORT
    The port number for the server.
    static final int
    SMALL_BLIND
    The amount of chips for the small blind.
    static final int
    STARTING_CHIPS
    The starting amount of chips for each player.
